name: com.pixygon.actors
description: Base for ALL living entities (players, NPCs, enemies, animas) — the 'Pixiel skeleton + brain'. Engine-portable core (ActorCore + IActorBrain) + a thin Unity adapter (Actor MonoBehaviour, ActorDefinition). Humanoids add an Avatar body; creatures add an Anima body. Carries a StatBlock from com.pixygon.stats.
